description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with the docker:stable-dind service and defines variables ARCHIVE_DIR, NETWORKPARSE_IMAGE_BASE, RELEASE_TAG, and TEST_TAG. In the build stage add a build job that first runs the before_script commands '[ -z ${DOCKER_HOST+x} ] && export DOCKER_HOST="tcp://localhost:2375"', 'echo "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" | docker login -u gitlab-ci-token --password-stdin "$CI_REGISTRY"', 'export NETWORKPARSE_LATEST_IMAGE=$NETWORKPARSE_IMAGE_BASE:latest', 'export NETWORKPARSE_TEST_IMAGE=$NETWORKPARSE_IMAGE_BASE:$TEST_TAG', 'export NETWORKPARSE_RELEASE_IMAGE=$NETWORKPARSE_IMAGE_BASE:$RELEASE_TAG' and then executes './ci-scripts/build-image.sh'. In the test stage add a test job that runs the same before_script commands and then './ci-scripts/test-package.sh'. In the deploy stage add a publish-docs job that runs only on the master branch, runs the before_script commands and then './ci-scripts/publish-docs.sh'. Also add a publish-package job that runs only on master, runs the before_script commands and then './ci-scripts/publish-package.sh'.
